name: Fresh Fruit Ambrosia
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the orange juice, club soda, and peeled banana to a blender.
2. Puree until smooth.
3. Pour over the fresh fruit pieces in a serving dish.
4. Sprinkle with nutmeg and cardamom.
5. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Before serving, sprinkle toasted coconut on top.
7. Serve immediately.
Serves 6 (1/2-cup servings)
One Serving = Calories: 81 Carbohydrates: 20 Protein: 1 Fat: 1
Sodium: 1 Potassium: 278 Cholesterol: 0
Exchange Value: 1-1/2 Fruit Exchanges
